title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 13-A. JUVENILE JURISDICTION

PLANNING AND IMPLEMENTATION ACT

§1441. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Juvenile Jurisdiction Planning and Implementation Act".

            Acts 2016, No. 501, §1, eff. June 14, 2016.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 13-A.  JUVENILE JURISDICTION
PLANNING AND IMPLEMENTATION ACT
§1441.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Juvenile Jurisdiction Planning
and Implementation Act".
Acts 2016, No. 501, §1, eff. June 14, 2016.
